parameters.name: aliasLike
parameters.description: The alias keyword for a fuzzy search.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description:
The traffic direction. Valid values: 

*   OutBound
*   InBound
*   Both

parameters.name: excludeBuiltinAiProxy
parameters.description: Specifies whether to exclude built-in plugins.

parameters.name: gatewayType
parameters.description: The instance type. Valid values: **AI** and **API**.

parameters.name: installed
parameters.description: Indicates whether the plugin is installed.

parameters.name: nameLike
parameters.description: The plugin name for a fuzzy search.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of entries per page.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description:
The plugin source. Valid values: 

*   HigressOfficial
*   HigressCommunity
*   Custom
